title: Optional Parameters
description: Define a function that takes a required name and an optional grade.
problemStatement:
Dart supports optional positional parameters using `[]`. Write a function `String greet(String name, [String? title])` that returns `"Hello [title] [name]"` if a title is provided, or just `"Hello [name]"` if it's not.

**Test both cases:** `greet('Alice')` and `greet('Bob', 'Captain')`.
hints: Inside the function, check if `title == null`.
